desc: Place a tag on a chosen element using the AnnotationPlacementEngine 8-quadrant collision-avoiding placer.
summary: Place a tag on a chosen element using the AnnotationPlacementEngine 8-quadrant collision-avoiding placer. After placement, automatically runs leader uncross if AnnotationDetectTagAlignment reports crossings (Agent 6 improvement).
keywords: tagging preferences place tag with smart collision avoidance

preprompts: Running tagging preferences place tag with smart collision avoidance…
successprompts: tagging preferences place tag with smart collision avoidance: done.
failureprompts: tagging preferences place tag with smart collision avoidance failed: {error}
